data.name: ErrMsgDefaultSettingsMissing
data.value: DefaultSettings section is missing from configuration

data.name: ErrMsgContentPathNotSupported
data.value: 'content' file path format is not supported: '{0}'

data.name: ErrMsgFolderRepoMustBeRelative
data.value: 'folderRepo' must be a relative path. Absolute paths are not allowed: '{0}'

data.name: DefaultHeaderDisclaimer
data.value: Do not remove this comment, lines and table

data.name: ExceptionJsonStringNull
data.value: The JSON string cannot be null or empty

data.name: ErrorInvalidFilenameFormat
data.value: Invalid filename format. Expected at least number and title

data.name: ValidationFieldWrongType
data.value: Field '{0}' must be of type {1}, but found: {2}

data.name: ValidationFieldMustBeNonNegative
data.value: Field '{0}' must be a non-negative number

data.name: ValidationScopesMustBeEmptyWhenLenScopeZero
data.value: Field '{0}' must be empty when '{1}' is 0

data.name: ValidationScopesMustNotBeEmptyWhenLenScopePositive
data.value: Field '{0}' must be not empty when '{1}' is greater than 0

data.name: ValidationScopeMinLength
data.value: Each scope in '{0}' must be at least as long as the '{1}' value ({2})

data.name: ValidationskipdomainInvalidScopes
data.value: The following scopes are not defined: {0}

data.name: ValidationFolderByScopeRequiresScopes
data.value: Field '{0}' cannot be true when '{1}' is empty

data.name: ConfigErrorInvalidBoolean
data.value: Invalid boolean value. Please enter 'true' or 'false' ({0})

data.name: ConfigErrorInvalidNumber
data.value: Invalid number format. Please enter a valid number

data.name: ConfigFieldDescCaseTransform
data.value: Text transformation applied to file names

data.name: ConfigFieldDescFolderByScope
data.value: Organize ADRs in separate folders by scope

data.name: ConfigFieldDescFolderRepo
data.value: Relative path to the ADR repository folder

data.name: ConfigFieldDescHeaderDisclaimer
data.value: Warning text displayed in ADR headers

data.name: ConfigFieldDescLanguage
data.value: Language code for localization (e.g., en-US, pt-BR)

data.name: ConfigFieldDescLenRevision
data.value: Length of the revision number in file names

data.name: ConfigFieldDescLenScope
data.value: Length of the scope abbreviation in file names

data.name: ConfigFieldDescLenSeq
data.value: Length of the sequence number in file names

data.name: ConfigFieldDescLenVersion
data.value: Length of the version number in file names

data.name: ConfigFieldDescOpenAdr
data.value: Command to open ADR files (must contain the text '{0}')

data.name: ConfigFieldDescScopes
data.value: List of valid scopes for ADRs (separated by semicolon. '*' at the end of each scope to avoid using the domain)

data.name: ConfigFieldDescSeparator
data.value: Character used to separate file name parts

data.name: ConfigFieldDescSkipDomain
data.value: Scopes where domain information is omitted

data.name: ConfigPromptOverwriteConfig
data.value: The configuration file already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

data.name: ErrMsgHelpTooManyArguments
data.value: Too many arguments provided for help command

data.name: ErrMsgOpenAdrMustContainPlaceholder
data.value: The command to open ADR must contain the text '{0}'

data.name: NewAdrErrorUniqueTitleAlreadyExists
data.value: An ADR with this title already exists: {0}

data.name: NewAdrPromptConfirmCreation
data.value: Confirm ADR creation with these details?

data.name: HelpUsageWizardNew
data.value: Wizard to create new ADR (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardInit
data.value: Wizard to configure the file repository (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageTargetRepoPath
data.value: Path to the repository's root folder

data.name: HelpUsageJsonFile
data.value: Path to repository(repo) configuration json file

data.name: HelpUsageHelp
data.value: Display help information (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardNewVer
data.value: Wizard to create a new version of an ADR (supress all other arguments)

data.name: ErrMsgAdrTooShort
data.value: The ADR file is too short

data.name: ErrMsgAdrFieldHeaderNotFound
data.value: The ADR file does not have the expected {0} header

data.name: ErrMsgAdrStatusLineFormatInvalid
data.value: Status line does not have the expected format

data.name: ErrMsgAdrStatusLineParenthesesInvalid
data.value: Status line has invalid parentheses order

data.name: ErrorRevisionNotconfig
data.value: Revision number not configured for repository {0}

data.name: CmdDescHelp
data.value: Display help information for the available commands

data.name: CmdDescConfig
data.value: Application configuration editor, repository, and default template ADR

data.name: CmdDescInit
data.value: Initialize or update a repository with ADRs settings

data.name: CmdDescNew
data.value: Create a new ADR with a new number (incremental number)

data.name: CmdDescVersion
data.value: Create a new ADR with a new version (incremental version, same number)

data.name: CmdDescAccepted
data.value: Update the status of an ADR to 'accepted'

data.name: CmdDescRejected
data.value: Update the status of an ADR to 'rejected'

data.name: CmdDescUndoStatus
data.value: Undo the status (accepted/rejected) of an ADR

data.name: HelpUsageWizardNewRev
data.value: Wizard to create a new revision of an ADR (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardSupersede
data.value: Wizard for supersede an ADR (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardApprove
data.value: Wizard for approve of ADR (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardReject
data.value: Wizard to reject an ADR (supress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardUndoStatus
data.value: Wizard to undo the status (accepted/rejected) of an ADR (suppress all other arguments)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardConfigApp
data.value: Application settings wizard (if file argument is not provided)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardConfigRepo
data.value: Repository settings wizard (if file argument is not provided)

data.name: NotLatestVersion
data.value: The specified ADR file is not the latest version. Please select the latest version

data.name: NotValidStatusForUpdate
data.value: The specified ADR file does not have a valid status({0}) for update or superseded

data.name: NotValidStatusForApproveAndReject
data.value: The specified ADR file not has a valid status ({0}) for updating

data.name: NotValidStatusForUndo
data.value: The specified ADR file does not have a valid status ({0}) for undo

data.name: NotValidStatusForSupersede
data.value: The specified ADR file does not have a valid status ({0}) or has already been superseded

data.name: HelpUsageWizardConfigTemplate
data.value: ADR template settings wizard (if file argument is not provided)

data.name: FileTemplateMusbeMd
data.value: The file template must be a ".md" extension file

data.name: WizardGroupConfigurationsDescription
data.value: Configure the application, repository template and the ADR content template settings

data.name: WizardAdrInitTitle
data.value: Initialize or update a repository with ADRs settings

data.name: EscForReturnWizard
data.value: After selected, press 'ESC' if you want to return to the wizard

data.name: WizardAdrVersionTitle
data.value: Create a new version an existing ADR

data.name: WizardAdrRevisionTitle
data.value: Create a new revision an existing ADR

data.name: NewAdrPromptConfirmRejectCreation
data.value: The ADR has been rejected. Do you want to continue?

data.name: HelpUsageEmptyAdr
data.value: Use only template when creating it (not copy content)

data.name: HelpUsageWizardRepo
data.value: Wizard to update the ADR settings of a repository

data.name: HelpUsageRepoTemplate
data.value: Change template of ADR for a repository

data.name: HelpUsageRepoVersion
data.value: Change the version length setting for a repository

data.name: HelpUsageRepoRevision
data.value: Change the revision length setting for a repository

data.name: HelpUsageRepoScope
data.value: Change the scope (length and items) setting for a repository

data.name: HelpUsageRepoScopeItems
data.value: List of scopes (add a '*' to the end of each scope to ignore the domain definition)

data.name: HelpUsageFileTemplate
data.value: Path to the template file. If omitted, it will be the application template

data.name: CmdDescMigrate
data.value: Migrate existing ADRs to use the tool (create header)

data.name: ErrorCannotDetermineRootPath
data.value: Cannot determine root path with ADR config: {0}

data.name: HelpUsageWizardMigrate
data.value: Wizard for migrating ADRs to use the AdrPlus tool (header creation)

data.name: PromptConfirmMigration
data.value: Confirm the ADR migration to these files?

data.name: NotFoundValidMigrateADR
data.value: No ADRs were found with valid criteria for migration

data.name: ViewOnlyPrompt
data.value: View only. Press Enter to continue

data.name: WizardConfigMigratedTitle
data.value: Migrate existing ADRs to ADRs Plus compatibility

data.name: HelpUsageFileReport
data.value: File path name (md file) for the explorer report

data.name: HelpUsageWizardExplorer
data.value: Wizard to explorer ADR files (supress all other arguments)

data.name: PromptConfirmExplorer
data.value: Confirm the explorer with this parameters?

data.name: ErrFileReportEmpty
data.value: Path to file name report is empty

data.name: PromptShowOrCreateReport
data.value: Do you want to show ADRs or create report?

data.name: WizardGroupExplorerReportDescription
data.value: Creates reports and displays ARDs metadata

data.name: HelpUsageWizardConfigMigration
data.value: Migration settings wizard (if file argument is not provided)

data.name: ConfigPromptOverwriteMigration
data.value: Only the migration pattern will be overwritten. Do you want to overwrite it?

data.name: PromptFieldsMigrationTitle
data.value: Select the elements that exist in the ADR file title

data.name: ErrorLenFileSampleMigration
data.value: Filename must be at least {0} characters long

data.name: PromptFileSampleMigration
data.value: Enter a sample ADR filename to validate the pattern

data.name: PromptPrefixPosition
data.value: Select a position for the 'Prefix' element at filename

data.name: PromptPrefixLength
data.value: Select a length for the 'Prefix' element at filename

data.name: PromptNumberPosition
data.value: Select a position for the 'Number' element at filename

data.name: PromptNumberLength
data.value: Select a length for the 'Number' element at filename

data.name: PromptVersionPosition
data.value: Select a position for the 'Version' element at filename

data.name: PromptVersionLength
data.value: Select a length for the 'Version' element at filename

data.name: PromptRevisionPosition
data.value: Select a position for the 'Revision' element at filename

data.name: PromptRevisionLength
data.value: Select a length for the 'Revision' element at filename

data.name: PromptTitlePosition
data.value: Select a position for the 'Title' element at filename

data.name: AlredyAdrPlusCreated
data.value: There are already ADRs that were created using this tool

data.name: InitCmdConfigUpdateFileAlreadyExists
data.value: Configuration file already exists. Do you want to update?

data.name: ErrMsgNewLenSeqGreatConfigSetting
data.value: There is a number ({0}) greater than the Configured ({1})

data.name: ErrMsgNewLenVerGreatConfigSetting
data.value: There is a version ({0}) greater than Configured ({1})

data.name: ErrMsgNewLenRevGreatConfigSetting
data.value: There is a revision ({0}) greater than Configured ({1})

data.name: InitConfigBannerMessage
data.value: Let's start with the initial configuration. (Press <ESC> to skip initial configuration)

data.name: InitConfigSkipConfirmation
data.value: Do you want to skip the initial configuration?

data.name: InitConfigSelectLanguage
data.value: Select the language for the interface

data.name: InitConfigLanguageEnglishDesc
data.value: Interface tool, status and header will be in English

data.name: InitConfigLanguagePortugueseDesc
data.value: Interface tool, status and header will be in Portuguese

data.name: InitConfigLanguageOtherDesc
data.value: Interface tool will be in English, status and header custom by user

data.name: InitConfigSelectEditor
data.value: Select the editor to open ADR when creating/superseding a ADR

data.name: InitConfigSelectPatterns
data.value: Select the desired patterns in the ADR files

data.name: InitConfigEnterPrefix
data.value: Enter the prefix for the ADR file name

data.name: InitConfigEnterNumberLength
data.value: Enter the length for number ADR

data.name: InitConfigEnterVersionLength
data.value: Enter the length for version ADR

data.name: InitConfigEnterRevisionLength
data.value: Enter the length for revision ADR

data.name: InitConfigEnterScopeLength
data.value: Enter the length for scope ADR

data.name: InitConfigCreateFolderByScope
data.value: Do you want to create folder for each scope?

data.name: InitConfigSelectTemplate
data.value: Select a file markdown template for new ADRs

data.name: InitConfigMigrationQuestion
data.value: Do you want to migrate existing ADRs?

data.name: InitConfigRemindCustomLanguage
data.value: Remember to set the status and header texts to your language

data.name: InitConfigDefaultFolderADR
data.value: Enter the default folder for ADRs

data.name: SummaryLengthForNumberInAdrFileName
data.value: Length for Number in ADR file name

data.name: SummaryLengthForVersionInAdrFileName
data.value: Length for Version in ADR file name

data.name: SummaryLengthForRevisionInAdrFileName
data.value: Length for Revision in ADR file name

data.name: SummaryLengthForScopeInAdrFileName
data.value: Length for Scope in ADR file name

data.name: SummaryCaseTransformForAdrFileName
data.value: Case transform for ADR file name

data.name: CmdDescReview
data.value: Create a new ADR with a new revison (incremental review, same number and version)

data.name: ErrMsgWithoutArgs
data.value: Invalid behavior value ({0}). Must be 'Help', 'Wizard' or 'None'

data.name: ConfigFieldDescBehaviorWithoutArgs
data.value: Behavior of the application when no arguments are provided

data.name: ErrMsgNotFoundArgsOrMissing
data.value: Not found arguments or missing arguments: {0}
